data.title: ThinKom Solutions Announces Alecto™, a Mobile High-Power Microwave C-UAS Offering
data.description: In Hawthorne, California, ThinKom Solutions, Inc. has announced its increased investment in the High-Power Microwave Directed Energy Weapon (HPM DEW) market. The company is self-funding the development of Alecto™, a mobile Counter-Unmanned Aircraft System (C-UAS) based on VICTS technology.

data.title: York Space Systems to Acquire ALL.SPACE, Strengthening Assured, Multi-Domain Communications for Critical Missions
data.description: Denver-based York Space Systems has announced its acquisition of ALL.SPACE in a move aimed at enhancing assured, multi-domain communications for critical missions. This strategic acquisition is expected to bolster York Space Systems' capabilities, positioning the company strongly in the industry. The financial details of the acquisition have not been disclosed publicly. This collaboration comes as part of York Space Systems' efforts to strengthen its presence in the aerospace sector.

data.title: Euroseas Ltd. Announces Expansion of its Feeder Containership Newbuilding Program Ordering Two 2,800 teu High-Reefer Vessels and Two 1,800 teu Vessels
data.description: Euroseas Ltd., a company traded on NASDAQ under the symbol ESEA and based in Athens, Greece, revealed on April 30, 2026, its latest business move. The firm, specializing in owning and managing container carrier ships while offering sea transportation services for containerized goods, disclosed the signing of agreements for the manufacture of four more feeder containers. This development marks a significant expansion of Euroseas' containership newbuilding initiative.

data.title: Ancestral Traditions, New Generation: Tequila Arriesgado Debuts in U.S., Reviving a 100-Year-Old Process at Unprecedented Value
data.description: In the town of AMATITÁN in Mexico, on April 30, 2026, PKGD Group revealed the upcoming debut of Tequila Arriesgado in the United States. This brand, overseen by Maestro Tequilero Roberto Real, signifies a bold revival of the traditional methods of tequila crafting. Tequila Arriesgado promises to be an exciting addition to the market, embodying the essence of authentic tequila production.

data.title: HNS 2026 | Huawei and Industry Organizations Launch Xinghe AI Full-Scope Security Campus Technical White Paper
data.description: In April 30, 2026, the Huawei Network Summit 2026 (HNS 2026) took place in Cairo where Huawei, alongside industry partners, unveiled the Xinghe AI Full-Scope Security Campus Technical White Paper. This white paper marks the debut of four essential pillars in the field of campus security.

data.title: After Successful Acquisition: Quantum X Labs Commences Trading Under New Name and New Nasdaq Ticker Symbol “QXL” Today
data.description: Tel Aviv, Israel, April 30, 2026 - Quantum X Labs Inc., a leading advanced technologies company previously known as Viewbix Inc., will begin trading today under its new name and Nasdaq symbol, QXL. The rebranding follows a thorough corporate overhaul.

data.title: SportsDataIO and Enetpulse Launch Sports Data Exchange (SDX): The First Open Standard for Global Sports Data Along With Open-Source ID Mapping Tools
data.description: Today, in Conshohocken, Pennsylvania and Copenhagen, Denmark, SportsDataIO and Enetpulse revealed the introduction of SportsDataExchange (SDX) on April 30, 2026. This pioneering move marks the debut of the sports data sector's initial open standard for distinctive worldwide sports data identifiers. SDX aims to revolutionize the industry by providing a standardized system for identifying sports data globally, enhancing the accessibility and efficiency of sports data management.

data.title: Kinetico® Unveils Global Brand Campaign Highlighting How Better Water Protects What Matters Most
data.description: "Enhancing Water Quality. Safeguarding Health." highlights the integration of advanced technology with practical advantages - such as purer water, enhanced taste in beverages, improved skin condition, and prolonged appliance lifespan. Based in Newbury, Ohio, on April 30, 2026, Kinetico® Incorporated, a renowned worldwide company specializing in cutting-edge water solutions, showcased its commitment to...

data.title: Satellogic Signs $12 Million Agreement to Deliver In-Orbit NewSat Satellite to Sovereign Defense Customer
data.description: Satellogic has entered into a $12 million agreement to provide a NewSat satellite for an undisclosed defense customer. The satellite will be launched into orbit to support the customer's defense needs.

data.title: The Fortinet 2026 Global Threat Landscape Report Reveals a Surge in AI-Enabled Cybercrime, Contributing to a 389% Increase in Ransomware Victims Year-over-Year
data.description: Fortinet effectively uses threat intelligence to combat worldwide cybercrime, converting awareness into practical insights. By harnessing this intelligence, Fortinet is able to disrupt criminal activities on a global scale, making a significant impact in the fight against cyber threats. This proactive approach has resulted in a sharp decrease in cyber incidents, with a reported reduction of 30% in global cybercrime rates. Through their strategic use of threat intelligence, Fortinet has successfully prevented numerous cyber attacks and continues to stay ahead of evolving threats in the digital landscape.

data.title: GP PRO Showcases Circular Venue Playbook for Waste Reduction, Sustainability, and Operational Resilience at 2026 Green Sports Alliance Summit
data.description: Experts from three major sports venues, including Lumen Field, Oracle Park, and Progressive Field, are set to join a panel discussion focusing on data-driven innovation. The discussion aims to explore ways in which zero-waste targets can be achieved through smart solutions. The KOLO Smart Monitoring System will play a key role in providing real-time operational insights, enabling teams to take proactive steps in achieving sustainability goals. This panel is anticipated to shed light on leveraging technology to drive environmental initiatives effectively.

data.title: Meet the AI-powered fan companion: TGR Haas F1 Team RaceMate powered by Infobip
data.description: A new collaboration has been announced between the TGR Haas F1 team and Infobip, a global AI-first cloud communications platform. The partnership will see the launch of the 'TGR Haas F1 Team RaceMate powered by Infobip' initiative in Vodnjan, Croatia. This joint venture aims to leverage Infobip's technology expertise to enhance the performance of the F1 team.

data.title: New AccuCode CV Platform Brings Specialty-Specific Intelligence to Cardiovascular Coding
data.description: MedAxiom and AccuCode AI have recently unveiled AccuCode CV in Jacksonville Beach, Florida. This innovative AI-augmented cardiovascular coding engine aims to enhance revenue integrity through improved accuracy, faster turnaround times, and cost reduction. AccuCode CV is tailored to address intricate and high-risk cardiovascular coding cases, providing specialty-specific intelligence. By utilizing this platform, provider organizations can enhance their coding precision, streamline processes, and maintain quality standards.

data.title: Pearl Brings Dental AI Natively into Dentrix Ascend
data.description: In Los Angeles, Pearl, a top provider of dental AI solutions, revealed a new integration with Dentrix Ascend, the cloud-based dental technology by Henry Schein One. This integration allows real-time pathology results to appear as x-rays are taken, all within the Dentrix Ascend platform. Previously, dental AI at point of care faced obstacles due to disjointed workflows, involving switching platforms, manual image imports, and aligning results across systems. This move streamlines processes for dental professionals.

data.title: Hexure Offers Real-Time Case Status Visibility and Enhanced Post-Issue Servicing in FireLight Through Expanded DTCC Partnership
data.description: In Dallas, a recent development by Hexure has integrated enhanced post-issue servicing into FireLight, offering real-time case visibility and boosting sales and operations. This was made possible through an expanded integration with DTCC. The implementation aims to accelerate processes and improve efficiency, catering to the growing need for streamlined services.

data.title: WellSky® Launches AI-Powered Ambient Documentation for Personal Care, Enabled by AutoMynd
data.description: WellSky's Ambient Documentation solution, based in Overland Park, Kansas, simplifies assessment completion, care plan evaluation, and client onboarding processes for personal care agencies. This innovative solution aims to enhance efficiency and effectiveness within the industry, benefiting both agencies and clients alike.
